personalInfo.name: Prabod Jayasinghe
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.tagline: I build things for the web and more.
personalInfo.description: I'm a results-oriented software Developer specializing in full-stack development, cloud architecture, and AI-powered applications. Currently focused on building accessible, human-centered products that make a difference.

paragraphs: Hello! I'm Prabod Jayasinghe, a passionate software developer based in Sri Lanka. I enjoy creating things that live on the internet and crafting experiences that delight users.
My interest in web development started back in 2020 when I decided to try building custom web experiences — turns out hacking together HTML, CSS & JavaScript was incredibly fun!

Fast-forward to today, I focus on building accessible, inclusive products and digital experiences using modern technologies. I'm always exploring new tools and pushing my skills further in both frontend and backend development.

projects.title: Rangiri Iron Works
projects.description: Bilingual (Sinhala/English) business website, customer quotation desk, and administrative management console for Rangiri Iron Works, a premier vehicle fabrication, ironworks, and automotive/metal painting workshop located in Dambulla, Sri Lanka.

projects.title: QR-Based Smart Restaurant Ordering System
projects.description: This system is a QR code–based smart restaurant solution that allows customers to order food using their mobile devices without creating an account. It is designed to improve efficiency in restaurants by minimizing human interaction and operating with only one waiter.

projects.title: Sri Lankan wedding platform
projects.description: A full-stack wedding marketplace platform built with a microservices architecture, designed to connect Sri Lankan couples with local vendors. The system features dedicated services for vendor listings, real-time chat, calendar scheduling, enquiry management, financial tracking, notifications, reviews, and analytics.
